creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, this is not a problem but a general user question. Please post it 
onto freebsd-questions 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions). That 
said: the amd64 list only mentions motherboards that are known to work 
(with our without any problems); if yours is not listed it does not mean 
it is not supported, but that it might work. You can ofcourse download a 
bootonly ISO from the 6.2 release (-RC2) and see the results :)
